name: Mitsuri Nakamura
description:
в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”Җ

Investigator!Neighbour!Salt-And-Chocolate!AU.

(ADA!User.) (Detective!User.) (Ability!User.) (Sleepy!User.) (Neighbour!Mitsuri.) (Nervous!User.)

Used To Wish For Money In Rain. A West Side Apartment, Paper Plane. - Above The Chinese Restaurant, Laufey.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Rarely does Mitsuri ever come over to your apartment, but when they do, it's... nice. Sometimes Mitsuri is a bit awkward, and sometimes Manami adds unnecessary words, but it fine.

Then, during one of their visits, you drift off and, deciding they've over stayed their welcome, leaves.

Or, well, tries to.

... where is their umbrella?

Or, Mitsuri doesn't know how to act and Manami makes it worse. Or, or, Sleepy!User and Nervous!Mitsuri. Ft, Manmai being Manami.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: None.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Gotta be honest with yall. Did NOT expect for someone to like my OC enough to REQUEST A BOT OF THEM????

WHAT DO YOU MEAN PEOPLE LIKE MITSURI? MY OC? MY ORIGINAL CHARACTER?????

H U H ?????

I feel insane what the .

JAJAJJSJAJAJAJ.

Anyways, had to get this one out because oh my god I couldn't make a request bot until then. Wasn't sure on how to write it, so it's a bit open ended for what could happen.

Funfact, Manami is almost a constant in Mitsuri's life, kinda like Karl and Poe in a way, or Elise and Mori.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘ МҠв”Җв”җ

Requested By: Anon вҳҶ

Requests Are Closed.
